title: Need feature to allow me to sort groups in a board
excerpt: I have 5-6 Boards that each have between 10-100 Groups. Right now the only way to alphabetize (or sort) the Groups is to Manually. Move. Each. One. Here’s a quote from a chat thread I had today, “At this moment, the plat…

posts.author: Jake709 (Jake)
posts.cookedHtml: I have 5-6 Boards that each have between 10-100 Groups. Right now the only way to alphabetize (or sort) the Groups is to Manually. Move. Each. One. Here’s a quote from a chat thread I had today, “At this moment, the platform doesn’t have a native way to sort groups in alphabetical order.” That’s the feature that I would really find helpful.

posts.author: PayWay369 (paytonwest@hotmail.com)
posts.cookedHtml: same for us, jake! i hear it weekly from our users as they have hundreds of groups entered by date. additionally, since the groups are using #'s, they must scroll waayyyyyy down to the bottom just to add a new group.

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml: I like this idea of expanding the “Sort By” feature to have “Sort Groups By” Also would love to be able to duplicate groups! I have the same groups across lots of boards and need to manually set them up across all.
